result.stdout:
Description:
  Execute arbitrary prompts via coding agent CLIs (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini).

Usage:
  AiCodingAgent [options]

Options:
  -p, --prompt <prompt>        The prompt to send to the coding agent.
  --stdin                      Read the prompt from stdin.
  --agent <agent>              Coding agent to use: claude, copilot, or gemini. Auto-detected if not specified (prefers claude > copilot > gemini).
  --cli-path <cli-path>        Path to the coding agent CLI executable. Auto-detected if not specified.
  --model <model>              Model effort level or model ID. Use 'medium' (Sonnet) or 'high' (Opus) for Claude. Ignored for other agents.
  --working-dir <working-dir>  The target project directory. Defaults to current directory.
  --add-dir <add-dir>          Additional directories to make accessible to the agent. Can be specified multiple times.
  --allow-all-paths            Allow the agent to access all file system paths without restriction.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
  --version                    Show version information
